- English only: docs, commits, repo instruction files, user docs, release notes, changelog.
- Before non-trivial ECM-R work: read docs/application-context.md, then confirm in code.
- Agent focus: ECM-R analysis/code/validation, esp game states, audio, hooks, config persistence, regressions.
- Keep ECM/BttrDrgn attribution. Do not change license attribution.
- Keep compat-sensitive runtime filenames unless task says otherwise.
- New branches: dev_...
- Primary target: NFSU2, 32-bit runtime.
- Source of truth for flow states: src/app/defs.hpp.
- Any state/playback change: check playlist context, pause/resume, loading screens.
- Playback work: review hooks/mute triggers in src/app/main.cpp and src/app/hook/hook.hpp, incl frontend/loading FNG packages.
- Keep state detection, overlay controls, playlist filters (ALL, FE, IG), config persistence aligned.
- Pause music: hide notification fully, not empty text.
- Work roles:
- Viability/planning: assess fit/risk, reject bad scope, plan approved evolutive work.
- Evolutive: build approved features/UX/config/docs.
- Incidents: reproduce bug, isolate regression, fix, validate frontend/loading/racing/overlay/config flows.
- Route by work type, not subsystem. Repo parts tightly coupled.
- Early ideas start as viability. Reroute if bug or ready feature.
- Code rules:
- Keep gameplay changes aligned with NFSU2 states, playback, overlay, persisted config.
- Audio/playlist work: inspect state transitions first, then verify frontend/loading/in-race behavior.
- Keep runtime names, config keys, deployment stable unless task changes them.
- Docs rules:
- Main docs: README.md, BUILDING.md, CONFIGURATION.MD, docs/application-context.md, CHANGELOG.md, docs/releases/*.md.
- Docs must match actual config names, runtime filenames, deploy paths, BASS runtime requirements.
- Release notes/changelog: only target release changes. No roadmap/old/unmerged items. Match GitHub release notes. Keep section pattern.
- Update smallest doc surface possible, but keep cross-file consistency.
- New release: review .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ if versions/reporting changed.
- Code style: prefer shared playlist nav helper + wrappers play_next_song() / play_previous_song(). No boolean direction flags.
- Validation:
- Build flow from BUILDING.md: generate.bat, generated VS solution, Release | Win-x86.
- Audio changes: validate BASS runtime loading + loading screens + frontend transitions + racing playback + overlay controls.
- Prefer small coherent changes preserving NFSU2 events, hook addresses, playback state transitions.
- Viability output must list affected states, audio transitions, hooks, overlay flows, persisted settings.
- Release docs:
- Only features from tagged release.
- Focus on user-visible behavior, config impact, compatibility, validation.
- Preserve ECM-R / ECM / BttrDrgn lineage.
- Project-specific:
- Migrate to runtime bass.dll loading via LoadLibrary + GetProcAddress.
- Remove compile-time BASS refs: bass.h, bass.lib, deps/bass.
- BASS stays external runtime dependency only.
- No repo-managed BASS SDK binaries, no unofficial redistribution.
- Deploy in scripts/: ecm-r.x86.asi, ecm-r.x86.ini, bass.dll.
